# claudette

> Autonomous GitHub-mediated orchestration system. File an issue, walk away, come back to a PR. Claudette watches your repos, builds a cross-repo dependency graph, and launches LLM coding sessions that dispatch sub-agents via git worktrees to write code, run tests, review PRs, and merge them.

Claudette is LLM-agnostic -- the LLM commands are configurable strings in config.yaml (`llm.cmd_session`, `llm.cmd_one_shot`, `llm.cmd_subagent`). Claude Code is the default, but any CLI-based coding agent works. Requires the `gh` CLI (authenticated) and Python 3.11+.

## Install

```bash
curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CircArgs/claudette/main/install.sh | bash
```

Or manually: `uv tool install git+https://github.com/CircArgs/claudette.git` / `pip install git+https://github.com/CircArgs/claudette.git`

## Instructions for LLM Agents

- To get started: `claudette init <dir>` -- it handles repo discovery, config, labels, cron, and everything else interactively.
- The primary workflow is: user creates a GitHub issue with the `claudette: ready-for-dev` label, claudette picks it up on the next cron tick, launches a Claude Code session, and opens a PR.
- Cross-repo dependencies use `Depends on owner/repo#8` syntax in issue bodies.
- Auto-merge is on by default (squash). Disable with `deterministic_rules.auto_merge_approved_prs: false`.
- Autonomy (self-directed work) is off by default. Enable with `claudette autonomy on`.
- Config lives at `<project-dir>/.claudette/config.yaml`. The `claudette config set` command can update individual values.
- When debugging, check: `claudette status`, `claudette session -f` (tail logs), `claudette why <issue-ref>`, and `claudette metrics`.

## Getting Started

- [README](https://github.com/CircArgs/claudette/blob/main/README.md): Install, quick start, architecture overview
- [Configuration](https://github.com/CircArgs/claudette/blob/main/docs/configuration.md): Full config.yaml reference with labels, routing, budgets, cron, multi-project
- [CLI Reference](https://github.com/CircArgs/claudette/blob/main/docs/cli.md): Every command and option

## Core Features

- [Auto-merge & PR Rules](https://github.com/CircArgs/claudette/blob/main/docs/pr-rules.md): Merge methods, auto-review, stale detection, retry/escalation
- [Agent Pipeline](https://github.com/CircArgs/claudette/blob/main/docs/pipeline.md): Multi-stage pipeline (scout/architect/builder/tester/reviewer)
- [Cross-repo Coordination](https://github.com/CircArgs/claudette/blob/main/docs/cross-repo.md): Dependency graph, blocking, cycle detection
- [Autonomy](https://github.com/CircArgs/claudette/blob/main/docs/autonomy.md): Discover, improve, ideate modes for self-directed work

## Optional

- [Metrics & Notifications](https://github.com/CircArgs/claudette/blob/main/docs/metrics.md): Tracking, webhooks, Rich TUI dashboard
- [Semantic Memory](https://github.com/CircArgs/claudette/blob/main/docs/memory.md): Search index backends (dense, bm25, hybrid)
- [Command Relay](https://github.com/CircArgs/claudette/blob/main/docs/relay.md): File-based IPC for sandboxed Claude environments
- [Contributing](https://github.com/CircArgs/claudette/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Dev setup, testing architecture, project structure
